rationale: Review 2's organizational findings (Findings 1-3) argue against the natural Lean/Mathlib induction-on-ℕ pattern that the code correctly employs, and the sqrtTower-with-Finset suggestion (Finding 3) would break the inductive structure; the remaining findings (4, 5) are minor contested preferences. Neither set of changes would clearly improve the PR, and acting on Findings 1-3 risks making it worse, so both reviews lead to essentially equivalent merged PRs.
